name: Workflow 3 — ERP Integration (Budget Check & PO Creation)

nodes.name: Switch: Budget Check or Create PO
HTTP: Return Budget Result to LangGraph
HTTP: Return PO Result to LangGraph

main.node: Switch: Budget Check or Create PO
HTTP: Return Budget Result to LangGraph
HTTP: Return PO Result to LangGraph

meta.description: Handles ERP interactions. Routes to either a budget check stub (returns available budget + cost center head details) or a PO creation stub (generates a PO number and confirms creation). Both stubs return results to the LangGraph agent. Replace stub Code nodes with real ERP HTTP calls in production.
